# Analysis Checklist

Use this checklist before making recommendations from customer data.

## Check Data Quality
- Are area names normalized enough to compare?
- Are project types merged into a small set?
- Are prices converted into comparable numeric bands?
- Are notes readable enough to classify customer quality?

## Check Business Signals
- Which segment appears most often?
- Which segment produces the largest order values?
- Which customers appear likely to refer more leads?
- Which notes show fast trust or strong objections?

## Check Marketing Implications
- What content can be backed by real proof?
- What offer can be stated without overpromising?
- Which audience deserves a dedicated campaign?
- Which segment should not be mixed into the same message?
